details.test: Task 1: Reserve cheapest beginner evening April workshop under $60 with pay_at_door
Task 2: Create non-overlapping schedule with 3 workshops
Task 3: More experienced instructor, workshop under $90, book 2 seats
Task 4: Register October 2025 retreat with single room and vegetarian meals
Task 5: Subscribe to monthly newsletter with workshop and performance topics
Task 6: Send question about a (youth) workshop with price and time filters (relaxed if needed)
Task 7: Open print-friendly cancellation and refund policy via FAQ
Task 8: Save accessible evening workshop to Favorites
Task 9: Add lower hourly rate in-studio workshop (<$40/hour) to cart and adjust quantity
